description: CompositionOrange printed V-neck kurta, made of 100% cotton, has contrast stitched border in blue on the neck and the edges of the three quarter sleeves, and slits on the sidesFittingRegularWash careWash separately as colour may bleedDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm ironThis aurelia kurta speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The handcrafted fabric will keep you going great throughout the day, while the classy design will make you the talk of the town. Pair it with leggings or jeans and flats for an ultra femme look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtisHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
